contents.value:
**Source:** [Device Tree Specification](https://devicetree-specification.readthedocs.io/)

## linux,initrd-end

Property name: `linux,initrd-end`

Value type: `<u32>` or `<u64>`

Specifies the physical end address (exclusive) of an initial ramdisk image in memory, set by the bootloader. Used together with `linux,initrd-start`.
